title: dodecatheon meadia var. brevifolium
intro: Dodecatheon meadia var. brevifolium, also known as the western or western pygmy shooting star, is a perennial plant species belonging to the gentian family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin problems, due to its content of iridoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Dodecatheon meadia var. brevifolium include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can be used externally as a salve or poultice to treat various health conditions.
